_comment: Seed data for PESiMENs Clubs section. Compiled from public sources: clubs.pes.edu and PESUfy community docs (RR Campus). Categories match the app's CATEGORIES list: academic, technical, cultural, sports, social, social_service, entrepreneurship, arts, other.

clubs.name: PES Innovation Lab
clubs.description: PES University's oldest and most prestigious technical club, fostering student-driven innovation, research projects, and hands-on engineering.

clubs.name: The Alcoding Club
clubs.description: The competitive programming club of PES University. Hosts coding contests, interview prep sessions, and algorithmic problem-solving workshops.

clubs.name: Google Developer Student Club (GDSC)
clubs.description: Google-backed developer community running workshops, study jams, and hackathons on web, mobile, cloud, and ML technologies.

clubs.name: IEEE Robotics and Automation Society, PES University
clubs.description: IEEE RAS student chapter focused on robotics, automation, and embedded systems projects and competitions.

clubs.name: IEEE Computer Society, PES University
clubs.description: IEEE CS student chapter organizing technical talks, workshops, and events across computer science domains.

clubs.name: |Q⟩Forest - Quantum Computing Community
clubs.description: Student community exploring quantum computing through study groups, talks, and hands-on sessions with quantum frameworks.

clubs.name: Apple Developers' Group (ADG)
clubs.description: Student group focused on iOS/macOS development, Swift programming, and Apple ecosystem projects.

clubs.name: ACM-W, PESU RR
clubs.description: Women in Tech club under ACM-W, supporting and celebrating women in computing through mentorship, talks, and events.

clubs.name: WEAL - Mental Health in Tech Club
clubs.description: CSE department club focused on mental health awareness and wellbeing within the tech community.

clubs.name: Shunya - The Official Math Club
clubs.description: The official mathematics club, hosting problem-solving sessions, math olympiad prep, and recreational mathematics events.

clubs.name: Equinox - The Space Club
clubs.description: Astronomy and space technology club organizing stargazing sessions, talks, and space-tech projects.

clubs.name: Aeolus
clubs.description: Aero design club working on UAVs, aircraft design, and aeromodelling competitions.

clubs.name: GronIT - Green Technology Club
clubs.description: Green technology club of RR Campus promoting sustainable and eco-friendly tech solutions.

clubs.name: Nexus
clubs.description: CSE department club (vertical) hosting technical events and peer-learning initiatives.

clubs.name: Encode.AI
clubs.description: AI/ML-focused club under the CSE (AIML) department, running workshops and projects in machine learning and deep learning.

clubs.name: AURA Club
clubs.description: CSE (AIML) department club focused on artificial intelligence and emerging technologies.

clubs.name: GCube PESU
clubs.description: The gaming club of PES University — esports tournaments, game nights, and game development meetups.

clubs.name: Team Haya
clubs.description: Racing club under the Mechanical Department, designing and building competitive race vehicles.

clubs.name: Vega Racing Electric
clubs.description: Electric vehicle racing team building formula-style EVs for national competitions.

clubs.name: The Entrepreneurship Cell
clubs.description: Student-run E-Cell fostering startup culture through pitch events, speaker sessions, and startup weekends.

clubs.name: PESU Venture Labs
clubs.description: Official venture lab supporting student startups with incubation, funding pathways, and mentorship.

clubs.name: EnactusPESU
clubs.description: Student-run chapter of Enactus, building social-impact entrepreneurial projects.

clubs.name: The Trading Hub PESU
clubs.description: Finance and trading club covering markets, investing fundamentals, and trading strategy sessions.

clubs.name: Beetles Business Club
clubs.description: Business club hosting case competitions, business quizzes, and corporate-skills events.

clubs.name: PES MUN Society
clubs.description: Model United Nations society organizing MUN conferences, debate training, and public-speaking practice.

clubs.name: The PES Debating Society
clubs.description: Competitive debating club participating in parliamentary debate tournaments and hosting internal debates.

clubs.name: TEDxPESU
clubs.description: Independently organized TED event bringing speakers and ideas worth spreading to campus.

clubs.name: Team Encore
clubs.description: Official Western dance crew of PES University RR Campus, performing at fests and competitions.

clubs.name: Team Sanskrithi
clubs.description: Indian contemporary dance team blending classical and modern styles.

clubs.name: Team Trance
clubs.description: Western dance crew competing across inter-college cultural fests.

clubs.name: Nautanki
clubs.description: Drama and theatre club staging plays, street theatre, and dramatics competitions.

clubs.name: The Music Club of PESU
clubs.description: Official music club of RR Campus, home to student bands, jam sessions, and live performances.

clubs.name: Chords
clubs.description: Indian music club celebrating classical and contemporary Indian music.

clubs.name: Kannada Koota RR Campus
clubs.description: Techno-cultural club celebrating Kannada language, literature, and culture on campus.

clubs.name: Linguista
clubs.description: Language club for exploring and learning new languages together.

clubs.name: Jnaanada PESU
clubs.description: Techno-linguistic club bridging language, culture, and technology.

clubs.name: The Grimm Readers PESU
clubs.description: Book club hosting reading circles, book discussions, and literary events.

clubs.name: Quotient Quiz Club
clubs.description: Quizzing club of RR Campus running trivia nights and competitive quiz tournaments.

clubs.name: Mosaic PESU
clubs.description: Design and creatives club for visual art, illustration, and creative projects.

clubs.name: DSGNR
clubs.description: Design club focused on graphic design, UI/UX, and visual communication.

clubs.name: PESU Meraki - The Fashion Club
clubs.description: Fashion club organizing runway events, styling workshops, and fashion showcases.

clubs.name: PIXELS Photography Club
clubs.description: Official photography club of RR Campus — photowalks, exhibitions, and photography contests.

clubs.name: HoPES PESU
clubs.description: Official videography club of RR Campus, covering campus events and producing creative video content.

clubs.name: PESU Talkies
clubs.description: Official film-making club producing short films and hosting screenwriting and cinema workshops.

clubs.name: Rotaract Club of PES University
clubs.description: Rotary-affiliated service club running community outreach, donation drives, and social initiatives.

clubs.name: Aikya PESU
clubs.description: Community service club working on social causes and volunteering programs.

clubs.name: The Changemakers' Society
clubs.description: Social impact club driving awareness campaigns and grassroots community projects.

clubs.name: Dhruva Club
clubs.description: CSR and community-services club organizing outreach and social-responsibility events.

clubs.name: init
clubs.description: Official departmental club of BCA, hosting hackathons like MYSTARA and technical events.

clubs.name: Kalaangana
clubs.description: Official cultural club of the BCA department.
